headline: Waters Corporation to Present at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference
summary: Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) announced that Udit Batra, Ph.D., Waters President and Chief Executive Officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, June 3rd, 2026, at 10:30 AM Eastern Time.

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on Becton, Dickinson and Company Stock?
summary: After the stock’s decline this year, do Wall Street analysts see a recovery in Becton, Dickinson and Company?
